markdown:
#  Permissions Matrix 
Table of Contents 
##  Invoicing 
Learn which user permissions are required to take the described actions in this tool. 
#####  Important
User access to the Project level Invoicing tool depends on the user's access permission to the contracts in the Project level **Prime Contracts** and/or **Commitments** tool. The tables below highlight which permissions are required for each tool in order to perform specific tasks with the Invoicing tool.
Some actions that impact this tool are done in other Procore tools. 
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take the action with this permission level.
![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18) Users can take this action with this permission level AND one or more additional requirements, like [granular permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-permissions-in-procore-and-how-do-they-work). 
##### [Invoicing](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/permissions-matrix/project-level-invoicing-permissions#invoicing)
##### [Prime Contracts](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/permissions-matrix/project-level-invoicing-permissions#prime-contracts)
##### [Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/permissions-matrix/project-level-invoicing-permissions#commitments)

 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   | Users with 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions must also be the **Invoice Contact** on the purchase order or subcontract.  |  
| Update a Subcontractor Schedule of Values as an Invoice Contact from the Invoicing Tool   
 |   | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check Gp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/abe8a7a8a4adf54b949c9a510974c4cf/7a1201c2b2dd2d468315dfb96a65187a/icon-mindtouch-table-check-gp.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | Users with 'Read Only' and 'Standard' level permissions must also be the **Invoice Contact** on the contract.  |
